description: Create a new user account in the Nx Witness VMS Web Admin at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html (credentials: admin/Admin1234!). The new user must have the login 'mike.chen', full name 'Mike Chen', email 'mike.chen@security.local', password 'SecureVMS2024!', and the role 'Viewer'. Verify that the user 'mike.chen' is successfully created and appears in the user list.
